title: Premier League action of the past weekend
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Pacaltsdorp United (62/2) recorded an easy eight-wicket victory on Saturday 20 January in the much-anticipated clash with Union Stars I (61 all out).

The bowling unit of Pacaltsdorp - Heath Richards (2/1), Franco Geldenhuys (2/7), Arend Visser (2/14) and Linford Crotz (2/23), laid the foundation for this victory. The team remains unbeaten and still top of the log.

Three half-centuries by Werner Botha (68), Henry Griffiths (67) and Jaco Fourie (58) helped George (283/8) to a 135-runs bonus point victory against Harlequins Forces (145 all out).

Knysna Cavaliers (101/5) won the Bitou derby against Plett Pioneers (99 all out) by five wickets while Union Stars II (181 all out) defeated Mossel Bay (127 all out) by 55 runs. Tyrece Karelse (112) scored a century for Union Stars.

George vs Harlequins Forces

GEORGE 283/8 - 50 overs (Werner Botha 68, Henry Griffiths 67, Jaco Fourie 58, Matt Jansen 4/51, Jermaine le Kay 2/44).

HARLEQUINS FORCES 145 all out - 33.1 overs (Jaco Marx 37, Lleyton Avontuur 24, Gerrit Badenhorst 4/37, Jaco Fourie 3/13, Geronovan Erasmus 2/29).

George won by 135 runs.

Knysna Cavaliers vs Plett Pioneers

PLETT PIONEERS 99 all out - 29.3 overs (Carlos Koeberg 31, Jacques Arendse 30, Francois Bonthuys 2/3, Quinton Visagie 2/9, Blake Linder 2/17, Mesuli Vuba 2/34).

KNYSNA CAVALIERS 101/5 - 27 overs (Keanan Vieira 35, Elroy Spies 22, AB van der Walt 21, Wayne Oraai 3/26).

Knysna Cavaliers won by five wickets.

Union Stars II vs Mossel Bay

UNION STARS II 181 all out - 46 overs (Tyrese Karelse 112).

MOSSEL BAY 127 all out - 25.1 overs (Ambrose Carelse 4/18, Sintu Majiza 3/18).

Union Stars II won by 55 runs.

Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars I

UNION STARS I 61 all out - 23.4 overs (Thurston Murphy 13, Heath Richards 2/1, Franco Geldenhuys 2/7, Arend Visser 2/14, Linford Crotz 2/23).

PACALTSDORP UNITED 62/2 - 12.5 overs (Heath Richards 37).

Pacaltsdorp United won by eight wickets.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
